title.rendered: Building a High-Impact Marketing Function from Scratch

content.rendered: In this episode of Marketing in the Now, Dave Reske, CEO of Nowspeed Marketing, interviews Lindsay O’Brien, Head of Marketing and Operations at Predictive. Lindsay shares her journey of building the marketing function at Predictive from the ground up and discusses her approach to balancing brand, demand generation, product marketing, content, and rev ops within a lean team.
